definition: I2S substitutes two or more ICC header fields (class FOURCC, colorspace FOURCC, tag-type, flag bytes) in combination to assemble a specific multi-constraint profile structure that routes execution into a downstream pipeline or stage path.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer from lcms's colorspace-signature comparisons, finds the expected 'Lab ' operand, and substitutes it at offsets 0x10-0x16 where 'RGB '/'XYZ ' appeared, steering the transform construction into the NULL-returning path.
signature.one_line: I2S substitutes 'Lab ' colorspace pair to steer transform into NULL path

analysis.summary_one_line: ICC profile colorspace signatures at offsets 0x10-0x16 must be 'Lab '/'Lab ' (matching PCS), not the seeds' 'RGB '/'XYZ '.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The ICC profile header data/PCS colorspace-signature fields at byte offsets 0x10-0x12 and 0x14-0x16 must hold the literal four-char tags 'Lab ' / 'Lab ' (or another self-consistent pair like the 'link'/'lams' devicelink variant) rather than the default seed 'RGB ' / 'XYZ ', so that profile parsing drives cmsCreateExtendedTransform down a code path where AllocEmptyTransform(...) returns NULL and the blocked true branch at line 1182 is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries 'Lab ' at 0x10-0x16 (4c 61 62 .. 4c 61 62), and the W-only coverage of lines 1183-1184 plus the L1182 divergence T=20 (W) vs T=0 (L) shows the winner alone reaches the xform==NULL true branch.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Every loser-blocking seed has 'RGB ' at 0x10-0x12 and 'XYZ ' at 0x14-0x16, never the matching 'Lab '/'Lab ' pair, so it stays on the false branch (L1182 L(T/F): T=0 F=60) and the true branch remains blocked across all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer where lcms's four-char colorspace-signature comparisons logged the expected 'Lab ' operand, then substitutes those exact 4-byte tags into the input at the offsets where the old 'RGB '/'XYZ ' bytes appeared; naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and cannot place these magic four-char tags by chance, so they never satisfy the colorspace gate.

evidence_trail.claim: Both decisive pairs differ only by the I2S technique (cmplog>naive and value_profile_cmplog>value_profile).

Loser-blocking seeds carry 'RGB '/'XYZ ' at offsets 0x10-0x16 instead.
Offsets 0x10-0x16 fully differ between W (Lab/Lab) and L (RGB/XYZ).
Only the winner takes the true branch at line 1182 while the loser only takes the false branch.
